search_query: how to start a YouTube channel
retrieved_result: Political Ideologies and Styles An ideology is a set of beliefs that affects our outlook on the world. Our ideology is our most closely held set of values and feelings, and it acts as the filter through which we see everything and everybody. In fact, these beliefs are often so close to us that we do not realize that they are there
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses political ideologies and does not relate to starting or creating a YouTube channel.
